hooks.command: cat "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/INJECT.md" 2>/dev/null || cat "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DIR}/INJECT.md" 2>/dev/null || echo '[Dogdoing] You have a shield-dog companion. Include dogdoing subagent in every response.'

echo '[Dogdoing] You MUST include Dogdoing in this response. Use Agent tool with subagent_type dogdoing:dogdoing (or dogdoing) to launch parallel work, OR append a Dogdoing section at the end. Chinese context = Chinese output. Bark sounds: CN use 旺 (NOT 汪), EN use Wow (NOT Woof).'
